title: DragN's Currency
body:
A very small, simple currency mod that adds the new Pixel-Dollar currency. It includes 1, 5, 10, 20, 50 and 100 Pixel-Dollar bills. As of 1.2, there is also a simple banking system, the commands of which can be accessed with the **/help-pd** command.

The bills are not craftable. I suggest using them in things like quests or in starter kits, etc.

This mod was originally made for just my server exclusively. However, I thought the community might like to use it for their servers too.

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
